name: AlphaSuite
desc: AlphaSuite is an open-source quantitative analysis platform that gives you the power to build, test, and deploy professional-grade trading strategies. It's des…
descFull: AlphaSuite is an open-source quantitative analysis platform that gives you the power to build, test, and deploy professional-grade trading strategies. It's designed for traders and analysts who want to move beyond simple backtests and develop a genuine, data-driven edge in the financial markets.
